creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As Lars Koeller wrote:

> Please update the xperfmon++-1.33 port/package in
> port/packages-current. Or did it not compile/run?

Huh?

Ports don't have version tags.  FreeBSD 2.2's ports are simply a
snapshot of the ports collection by the time the release has been
done, so the xperfmon port _is_ the updated one.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
